commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c41644d464c812e0ef4d3cbd2670f019e70aac88)
commands.review_summary:
The PR allows image-only `/v1/responses` input past the missing-message guard and adds regression tests for image-only and empty-content requests.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +46. Total +48 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main rejects the image-only request at the OpenResponses HTTP guard, while source tracing of this patch shows it would instead fail the shared agent command's blank-message validation.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The blocker has a narrow mechanical repair: preserve the sibling image-only prompt invariant and add coverage across shared ingress validation.

target.title: fix(gateway): accept image-only input on /v1/responses
target.body:
## Summary

`POST /v1/responses` (OpenResponses) rejected requests whose `input` contained only an `input_image` (no `input_text`) with `400 Missing user message in input.`, even though the image was successfully parsed and collected. The equivalent `/v1/chat/completions` endpoint accepts image-only input, so the two endpoints were inconsistent and multimodal (image-only) requests were needlessly blocked.

### Root cause

The image is parsed and pushed into the `images` array (`src/gateway/openresponses-http.ts`, `let images: ImageContent[]`), but the "user message exists" guard only inspected `prompt.message`:

- `extractTextContent` only honors `input_text` / `output_text`; `input_image` contributes an empty string (`src/gateway/openresponses-prompt.ts`).
- A message whose extracted text is empty is skipped entirely, so `conversationEntries` is empty.
- `buildAgentMessageFromConversationEntries` returns `""` for empty entries (`src/gateway/agent-prompt.ts`).
- The guard then sees an empty `message` and returns 400 without considering `images`.

The Chat Completions guard already accounts for images:

```ts
// src/gateway/openai-http.ts
if (!prompt.message && images.length === 0) {
```

OpenResponses was missing the `&& images.length === 0` clause.

### Fix

Align the OpenResponses guard with Chat Completions: only error when there is neither text nor image. The downstream `runResponsesAgentCommand({ message, images, ... })` already accepts both, so an empty `message` plus non-empty `images` behaves exactly like the Chat Completions path; no other changes are needed.

### Behavior impact / risk

- Previously-400 image-only requests are now accepted (parity with `/v1/chat/completions`).
- Requests with text are unaffected (`prompt.message` non-empty short-circuits).
- Requests with neither text nor image still return `400 Missing user message`.
- Low risk; unifies semantics across the two endpoints.

## Verification

`Behavior addressed`: /v1/responses now accepts image-only input instead of returning 400.
`Real environment tested`: local clone, Node 22.22.3, pnpm 11.2.2, full `pnpm install`.
`Exact steps or command run after this patch`: `pnpm test src/gateway/openresponses-http.test.ts`
`Evidence after fix`: `Test Files 3 passed (3)` / `Tests 84 passed (84)` (includes the two new regression tests below).
`Observed result after fix`: image-only base64 input returns 200 with the image reaching the agent (`message: ""`, `images.length === 1`); empty content (no text, no image) still returns 400 `Missing user message`.
`What was not tested`: did not run the full repo gate or live multi-image/data-URL provider round-trips; relying on CI for broader coverage.

### Added regression tests (`src/gateway/openresponses-http.test.ts`)

- image-only base64 `input_image` -> 200, image forwarded to agent.
- message with empty `content` (no text, no image) -> 400 `Missing user message`.
